word: G606 - ἀπόκειμαι - apókeimai - ap-ok'-i-mahee - Be appointed

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀπόκειμαι

- Transliteration: Apokeimai

- Phonetic: ap-ok'-i-mahee

- Definition:

1. to be laid away, laid by, reserved

2. reserved for one, awaiting him

- Origin: from G575 and G2749

- TDNT entry: 13:55,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and G2749; to be reserved; figuratively to await: - be appointed (be) laid up.
